title: abutilon pedunculare
intro: Abutilon pedunculare, also known as the Indian mallow or country mallow, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It is a herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Abutilon pedunculare include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote wound healing. Abutilon pedunculare is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
